MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: SRavinantapricha; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by J.B.
Attorney, Tony Ruch, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Alicia Sanchez, is present.
Attorney, Richard Smoke, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 514, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
